abort.single_instance_allowed: Es ist nur eine Integration für Smart Irrigation zulässig.

error.name: Gebe einen eindeutigen Namen für die Integration ein.

data.name: Eindeutiger Namen der Integration
data.use_weather_service: Use a weather service (Open Weather Map or Pirate Weather) for weather data or forecasting. Enable this option if you intent to use one of the supported weather services for at least part of the weather data, including forecasting. Disable this option if you want to use another source, such as your own weather station, exclusively. In this case, Smart Irigation will not be able to use forecasts.

error.auth: API-Schlüssel oder Version des Wetterdienstes falsch
error.invalid_coordinates: Ungültige Koordinaten angegeben. Bitte überprüfe den Breitengrad (-90 bis 90) und den Längengrad (-180 bis 180).

data.use_weather_service: Use a weather service (Open Weather Map or Pirate Weather) for weather data or forecasting. Enable this option if you intent to use one of the supported weather services for at least part of the weather data, including forecasting. Disable this option if you want to use another source, such as your own weather station, exclusively. In this case, Smart Irigation will not be able to use forecasts.

coordinates.title: Standortkoordinaten
coordinates.description: Konfiguriere die Standortkoordinaten für den Abruf von Wetterdaten. Bei Bedarf kannst du manuelle Koordinaten verwenden, die von deinem Home-Assistant-Standort abweichen.

data.manual_coordinates_enabled: Manuelle Koordinaten statt des Home-Assistant-Standorts verwenden
